[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 001001100 3
5 101000000 2
6 000000010 1
7 001001100 3

01 000001100 2
12 100000001 2
23 011000110 4
34 100001000 2

56 000101101 4
67 111000000 3
70 000110010 3

04 001001100 3 match 4 7
15 100000000 1
